title: Topogram
description: Topogram is a wideband voltage-controlled 2D shape generator with a dedicated voltage-controlled 3D perspective stage: you create geometry in the plane, then foreshorten and skew it in depth using continuous CV—built for 3D-like scenes without a digital framebuffer. Block diagram and full operator guide: Manual. Jack list: Specs.

seo.title: Topogram | LZX Industries
seo.description: Topogram: 2D shapes + 3D perspective (LZX Orion). See Manual and Specs.
